title: Stronger

lyrics.text: You know the bed feels warmer
lyrics.translation: 你要知道 这张床的煦暖

lyrics.text: Sleeping here alone
lyrics.translation: 孤身一人在这里入眠

lyrics.text: You know I dream in colour
lyrics.translation: 你要知道 我做的梦都是缤纷的

lyrics.text: And do the things I want
lyrics.translation: 随心所欲

lyrics.text: You think you got the best of me
lyrics.translation: 你以为你可以把我最好的一面带走？

lyrics.text: Think you had the last laugh
lyrics.translation: 以为我会一蹶不振吗？

lyrics.text: Bet you think that everything good is gone
lyrics.translation: 你以为所有的美好 都会再与我无缘了吗？

lyrics.text: Think you left me broken down
lyrics.translation: 以为我要崩溃了吗？

lyrics.text: Think that I'd come running back
lyrics.translation: 以为我还会死皮赖脸地回来求你？

lyrics.text: Baby you don't know me' cause you're dead wrong
lyrics.translation: 宝贝 你什么都不懂 简直无可救药

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger
lyrics.translation: 所有不能杀死你的将使你更加强大

lyrics.text: Stand a little taller
lyrics.translation: 变得更高

lyrics.text: Doesn't mean I'm lonely when I'm alone
lyrics.translation: 一个人时并不意味着我会寂寞

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes a fighter
lyrics.translation: 回头看所经历的事反而让我更有动力前进

lyrics.text: Footsteps even lighter
lyrics.translation: 脚步迈得更自信

lyrics.text: Doesn't mean I'm over cause you're gone
lyrics.translation: 你的离去 并不意味着我的故事结束了？

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger' stronger
lyrics.translation: 经历那么多 我越挫越勇

lyrics.text: Just me' myself and I
lyrics.translation: 我能独自找到最好的状态

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger
lyrics.translation: 这场闹剧 为何不能让你变得更勇敢？

lyrics.text: Stand a little taller
lyrics.translation: 独立清醒点吧

lyrics.text: Doesn't mean I'm lonely when I'm alone
lyrics.translation: 虽然单身 但并不意味着我的生活会失去乐趣

lyrics.text: You heard that I was starting over with someone new
lyrics.translation: 你听说了吧 我已经开始我的新生活了

lyrics.text: They told you I was moving on over you
lyrics.translation: 他们都知道 你已经是过去式了

lyrics.text: You didn't think that I'd come back
lyrics.translation: 你有没料到 有一天我会大摇大摆地回来

lyrics.text: I'd come back swinging
lyrics.translation: 回来鄙视你

lyrics.text: You tried to break me' but you see
lyrics.translation: 你曾经想甩了我 但是你要知道

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger
lyrics.translation: 没能毁灭我我就将变得更强大

lyrics.text: Stand a little taller
lyrics.translation: 站得更高

lyrics.text: Doesn't mean I'm lonely when I'm alone
lyrics.translation: 我单身但并不意味着我孤独寂寞

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes a fighter
lyrics.translation: 重整旗鼓 昂扬向上 越挫越勇

lyrics.text: Footsteps even lighter
lyrics.translation: 自信地迈出去

lyrics.text: Doesn't mean I'm over cause you're gone
lyrics.translation: 你的离去 并不代表我的故事就完了

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger' stronger
lyrics.translation: 自从你的离开 我重新审视我的价值

lyrics.text: Just me' myself and I
lyrics.translation: 只有我一个人

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger
lyrics.translation: 跟你分手让我变得更勇敢

lyrics.text: Stand a little taller
lyrics.translation: 站得更笔挺

lyrics.text: Doesn't mean I'm lonely when I'm alone
lyrics.translation: 我单身 并不意味着我会患得患失

lyrics.text: Thanks to you I got a new thing started
lyrics.translation: 分手万岁 我有了新的开始

lyrics.text: Thanks to you I'm not the broken hearted
lyrics.translation: 自由万岁 我才不会心碎

lyrics.text: Thanks to you I'm finally thinking about me
lyrics.translation: 我终于开始做我自己

lyrics.text: You know in the end the day you left was just my beginning
lyrics.translation: 我告诉你 你离开那天 正是我新生活的开始

lyrics.text: In the end
lyrics.translation: 再说一遍

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger
lyrics.translation: 跟你分开后 我重整旗鼓 绝不退缩

lyrics.text: Stand a little taller
lyrics.translation: 站得更笔挺

lyrics.text: Doesn't mean I'm lonely when I'm alone
lyrics.translation: 我单身 并不意味着我的生活会失去乐趣

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes a fighter
lyrics.translation: 我没有任何理由要退缩

lyrics.text: Footsteps even lighter
lyrics.translation: 迈步更轻松

lyrics.text: Doesn't mean I'm over cause you're gone
lyrics.translation: 你的离去 并不意味着我就完了

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger' stronger
lyrics.translation: 跟你分开后 我重整旗鼓 绝不退缩

lyrics.text: Just me' myself and I
lyrics.translation: 我一个人就行了

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger
lyrics.translation: 经历这些事后 我将大胆往前走

lyrics.text: Stand a little taller
lyrics.translation: 站得更笔挺

lyrics.text: Doesn't mean I'm lonely when I'm alone
lyrics.translation: 我单身 并不意味着我会患得患失

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger' stronger
lyrics.translation: 没有什么了不起的 大胆往前走吧

lyrics.text: Just me' myself and I
lyrics.translation: 一个人绰绰有余

lyrics.text: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger
lyrics.translation: 打不死你的 只会让你更强大

lyrics.text: Stand a little taller
lyrics.translation: 释放你的霸气

lyrics.text: Doesn't mean I'm lonely when I'm alone
lyrics.translation: 单身的生活乐趣无穷
